---
title: "The Rev. Charles Moor"
---

## The Rev. Charles Moor

**Dates:** (b.1857)

### Description

second son of the Rev. John Frewen Moor, jr.

### Biography

He was curate of Grimsby for four years, then (1889) Vicar of Barton on Humber; he married (1889) Constance Mary Moon, and retired in 1901 to Westgate on sea; he had several children. [1861 census; <i>Erminois</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 8th [1883]
- Letter from Oct 1st 1883

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
